question: When will my order arrive?
answer: Standard shipping takes 3-7 business days. You can track your order here: [tracking link]. If there's a delay, we'll notify you by email.

question: How do I track my package?
answer: A tracking number is sent to your email when the order ships. Click the link or enter it on the carrier's website.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes! International orders take 7-21 days depending on destination. Customs fees may apply.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day return window. Items must be in original condition. Customized products cannot be returned unless defective.

question: How do I get a refund?
answer: Once we receive the returned item, refunds are processed within 3-5 business days to your original payment method.

question: My item arrived damaged, what do I do?
answer: I'm sorry about that! Please send photos of the damage to our support email within 48 hours. We'll send a replacement or refund promptly.

question: Can I add a name or photo to this product?
answer: Absolutely! Leave your customization details in the order notes at checkout. Custom orders add 1-2 extra processing days.

question: Is the print permanent or will it fade?
answer: We use dye-sublimation printing — the ink bonds into the fibers. With proper care (cold wash, air dry), it won't fade or crack.

question: What material is this made of?
answer: This is made of premium [material]. See the full specs on the product page for detailed material composition.

question: Can I wash this in the washing machine?
answer: We recommend cold hand wash and lay flat to dry. Avoid bleach and tumble dry to maintain quality.

question: What size should I choose?
answer: Check the size chart in the product images. If you're between sizes, we recommend sizing up. Feel free to share your measurements and I'll help!

question: Do you offer gift wrapping?
answer: We don't do traditional gift wrap, but we can include a handwritten gift note — just leave your message in the order notes!

question: Will the price be visible in the package?
answer: No! All packages are plain boxes/bags with no branding or price information. Perfect for gifts.

question: Can I cancel or modify my order?
answer: You can cancel within 1 hour of placing the order. After that, modifications depend on the production stage — contact us ASAP.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept credit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All transactions are secure and encrypted.
